final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial still-life photograph of a wabi-sabi arrangement featuring weathered ceramics and dried branches.

Style/medium: fine art still-life photography, wabi-sabi aesthetic, Japanese minimalism, subtle imperfections celebrated
Composition: medium shot, slightly off-center arrangement, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field with soft background falloff
Subject: rustic hand-thrown ceramic vase with uneven glaze and visible firing marks, holding bare dried branches with twisted forms
Scene/backdrop: aged wooden table with worn patina, visible grain and scratches, plain wall behind
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight streaming through a window at an angle, gentle shadows, quiet contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: muted earth tones — warm beige, soft gray, weathered brown, subtle ochre accents
Materials/textures: rough unglazed clay surface, brittle dry wood, scratched matte wood grain, dust particles in light
Avoid: polished perfection, saturated colors, studio flash, plastic textures, over-sharpening, 8K stuffer aesthetic
